basic_details.organization_name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of RGIPT. Have been announced through the RGIPT Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation for reserved categories as per Government of India guidelines; exceptional cases considered.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch, Very good academic record throughout
qualification.details: Professor: PhD with first class or equivalent at preceding degree in appropriate branch, very good academic record, 10 years teaching/research/industrial experience of which at least 4 years at Associate Professor level. Associate Professor: PhD with first class or equivalent at preceding degree in appropriate branch, very good academic record, minimum 6 years teaching/research/industrial experience of which at least 3 years at Assistant Professor level. Assistant Professor Grade-I: PhD with first class or equivalent at preceding degree in appropriate branch, very good academic record, 3 or more years teaching/research/industrial experience excluding PhD period. Assistant Professor Grade-II (on Contract): PhD with first class or equivalent at preceding degree in appropriate branch, very good academic record; fresh PhD eligible on contract for first 3 years.

salary_details.details: Salary Range: Rs. 70900 - Rs. 159100 Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGIPT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RGIPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor posts at RGIPT is 10th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for all posts is a PhD with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch, along with a very good academic record throughout. Specific experience requirements vary for each post level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the RGIPT recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions ranges from Rs. 70,900 to Rs. 1,59,100 per month, depending on the post and experience level.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the RGIPT recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of RGIPT. The application link and detailed instructions are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RGIPT recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the RGIPT recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does RGIPT offer different grades for Assistant Professors?
faq.answer: Yes, RGIPT is recruiting for Assistant Professor Grade-I and Assistant Professor Grade-II (on Contract) positions, each with specific experience requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology?
faq.answer: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) is located in Jais, Uttar Pradesh.
